meta.name: Alex Chen
meta.title: Full-Stack Software Engineer
meta.tagline: I build scalable systems and elegant interfaces
meta.heroDescription: I engineer full-stack products, distributed systems, and developer tools for companies where uptime and speed are non-negotiable.
meta.availability: Open to Senior / Staff Engineer roles and selected contract work.

about.heading: I specialize in backend architecture, API design, and high-performance web applications
about.body: I'm currently open to full-time Senior / Staff Engineer roles at product-driven companies. I care deeply about developer experience, system reliability, and shipping things that actually work.

projects.title: Distributed Task Queue
projects.description: A fault-tolerant, horizontally scalable task queue built on Redis and PostgreSQL. Supports retries, dead-letter queues, priorities, and real-time dashboard monitoring.

projects.title: Dev Analytics Platform
projects.description: An internal platform for engineering teams to track deploy frequency, MTTR, lead time, and change failure rate — the four DORA metrics in one clean UI.

projects.title: API Gateway
projects.description: A lightweight, pluggable API gateway in Go with rate limiting, JWT auth, circuit breaking, and per-route observability built in.

projects.title: Schema Diff CLI
projects.description: A fast Rust CLI that diffs SQL schemas across environments, generates migration scripts, and validates against a set of codified conventions.

projects.title: SaaS Billing Engine
projects.description: A production billing engine integrating Stripe subscriptions, usage-based pricing, invoice generation, and a self-serve customer portal.

projects.title: Semantic Code Search
projects.description: A semantic search engine for internal codebases using code embeddings, vector search, and a FastAPI backend — indexed 200k+ files in under 2 minutes.

experience.description: Building reliability tooling for the Payments API. Contributed to latency reduction of core charge endpoints by 40%. Led a team of 4 on the internal observability platform.
Delivered end-to-end products for early-stage startups — from architecture through to production. Clients in fintech, developer tooling, and e-commerce.
Worked on the edge network and deployment pipeline. Helped ship the monorepo support feature and improved cold start times for serverless functions.
Consulted for enterprise clients on modernizing legacy Java systems, introduced CI/CD pipelines, and mentored junior developers.

skills.title: Languages

skills.title: Backend & APIs
skills.description: Node.js, Express, Fastify, gRPC, REST, WebSockets

skills.title: Databases

skills.title: Cloud & DevOps

personalProjects.title: openblocks
personalProjects.description: An open-source UI component library for developer tools — minimal, accessible, dark-mode first.

personalProjects.title: sqlcraft (soon)
